title: Mama's Herbs and Harvest
description: Mama's Herbs and Harvest is a light farming mod with many crops and growable herbs that can be potted when fully grown.
body:
Mama's Herbs and Harvest is a farming mod which is also the base for the recipes in Mama's Minis such as MerryMaking and Happy Hallows. There are 32 growable crops, grapes, 8 fruit-bearing trees, and 14 herbs. The "Pantry Update", which adds new blocks, items, and food, was released in early February of 2026.

There is a produce basket for decoration and very light storage. These also work with vanilla fruits/vegetables, with the exception of melons and pumpkins. The herbs can be placed in a pot once they have grown to maturity and harvested. 

The seeds or plantable crop item can be found in chests throughout the overworld--inside villages, dungeons, shipwrecks, and abandoned mineshafts.  The trees grow naturally in every biome; look for a rounded small tree that has leaves slightly darker than dark oak.

The baskets are crafted with 4 bamboo, 2 on top and 2 on the bottom, similar to a polished stone or brick layout. The recipe should automatically show up once you have bamboo in your inventory. When a basket is placed, use the fruit/veggie/grain item on it to place one in the basket. You'll see it as the basket fills up. Each one can hold 8 produce of a single type. To remove your produce from the basket, right-click with an empty hand.

For questions, issues, or assistance, the fastest way to reach me is my discord, Mama's Mods: [https://discord.gg/2QWyQ8fkUr](https://discord.gg/2QWyQ8fkUr)

Mama's Mods Website--Mod info, how-tos, recipes, etc: [https://www.mamailes.com/herbs/herbs.html](https://www.mamailes.com/herbs/herbs.html)
